curation_notes: Single file patch in route/gateway_route.go. The patch adds a rewriteRequestSourceIP function that strips and re-derives X-Forwarded-For from RemoteAddr, then calls it in GetRoute before proxying. Pre-patch, the gateway blindly trusted the X-Forwarded-For header, letting remote attackers spoof localhost and bypass IP-based authentication. The vulnerability location is the GetRoute handler where requests are proxied without IP validation. No sibling files share this pattern — management_route.go uses JWT-based auth via gin middleware, and static_route.go only serves static files. Pre-assigned class auth-bypass is correct per CWE-306 (Missing Authentication) and CWE-348 (Use of Less Trusted Source).
